meanings.definition: fine powdery material such as dry earth or pollen that can be blown about in the air
examples: the furniture was covered with dust

meanings.definition: the remains of something that has been destroyed or broken up
free microscopic particles of solid material
examples: astronomers say that the empty space between planets actually contains measurable amounts of dust

meanings.definition: rub the dust over a surface so as to blur the outlines of a shape
examples: The artist dusted the charcoal drawing down to a faint image

meanings.definition: cover with a light dusting of a substance

examples: He scattered gun powder under the wagon
